understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without ever landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), completing levels within the attempt/turn limits to ultimately win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After a horizontal move, gravity (shown as current gravity) automatically carries the player in that gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes end the run immediately), or reach the `+` goal. CLICK can be used on breakable/clickable blocks (e.g., `x`) at a specific target_position to remove them and open new fall paths; clicking does not change player position directly. UNDO reverts the previous action, useful for recovering from a bad move or click. Progress depends on using moves to reach passages (different y-level landings) and using clicks to clear blocks that obstruct the gravity path, while avoiding spikes and staying within the turn budget.
